introSection: Nissi Coaster is a steel kiddie roller coaster currently located at Marah Land in Muscat City, Muscat, Oman.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The train is designed to resemble a caterpillar.

fullText:
Nissi Coaster is a steel kiddie roller coaster currently located at Marah Land in Muscat City, Muscat, Oman.



Yellow track and black supports.

The train is designed to resemble a caterpillar.
